sections.paragraph:
Original: מקצעה

Transliteration: meqûts‛âh

Phonetic: mek-oots-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. place of corner structure, corner buttress, inner corner-buttress
    1. corner post

Origin: from H7106 in the denominative sense of bending

TWOT entry: 2057a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
